text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Mama's package should get here any<n>day now!
It'll have snacks, milk...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and pictures of the dogs! I can't wait<n>to see
such a big part of our farm's<n>family again!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
They're all such good dogs too... I miss<n>their
sloppy kisses somethin' fierce.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I hope you get to meet 'em someday<n>too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they'll shower you in love and<n>kisses!
You're my trainer, after all!
